subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Sanderson, spoken on 1913-01-28
subcodes.first_line: Paris is like unto a green meadow, the people are like unto sheep, they are grazing in this meadow, they drink of the flowing streams. The materialists, cow-like, graze also with the rest.
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @symbolism, @regarding the receptivity of the hearer in teaching the Cause
